entry.title: I could never define all that you are to me
entry.summary:
Author: endversebuddie

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,396Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 39

Summary: "Please don't tell them you know me." Eddie wanted to ask questions but the look on Ravi's face made him stop."Hey, no worries. I won't tell them anything. Plus I'm pretty sure Buck wont let me out of his sight long enough to make conversation with the others." or: eddie comes home from the army trying to surprise his fiance only to end up being the one surprised

entry.title: Three Of A Kind
entry.summary:
Author: Warlock_Nerd

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 17,983Chapters: 5/5Kudos: 152

Summary: What’s more pathetic than being in love with your best friend and co-parenting his kid with him then co-parenting your own kid with him in return?And what’s more pathetic than that then moving in together platonically so that the kids can have a better routine?And more pathetic than that is sharing a bed so that the two kids can have a room each?!And more more more more pathetic… how about adding a third child into the mix?***AKA - Buck and Eddie are still hopelessly in love with each other but too scared to make a move even after moving in and raising two kids together. So Destiny herself has had enough and made a plan to get these idiots together by magicking them a baby girl in the Safe Haven Baby Box.Enjoy :3

entry.title: What a night to forget.
entry.summary:
Author: Absolute_Maniac

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 71,997Chapters: 28/?Kudos: 572

Summary: “You might want to see this…” He reached over with a piece of paper in his hand. Buck took it and turned his phone over to him in return. Eddie bit into his fist as he studied the picture. Buck looked down at the paper in his hand and turned it over to the right side. It was a copy of a marriage license for Mr. Evan Buckley-Diaz and Mr. Edmundo Buckley-Diaz.orBuck and Eddie, wake up married after a night of drinking with no memory of the night before. This is the story of how they decide to deal with this drunken decision while learning a lot about themselves and each other as they go from best friends to platonic husbands and, at last, to lovers.

entry.title: Finding Those Lost
entry.summary:
Author: Not_Ren_42

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 93,812Chapters: 22/24Kudos: 687

Summary: Evangaline ‘Buck’ Buckley has made a home for herself in LA. After the long and difficult path to get here, she doesn’t think there is much left to surprise her. She has a new family, her son is thriving, and she’s loving her work as a firefighter. So what if sometimes the dark still comes for her some nights?When a new firefighter starts at the station, everything Buck thought she knew is thrown up in the air as she tries to keep her past and private life together. Things only get worse when dispatch starts messing the whole station around. -+- A season 2 rewrite that won't make much sense unless you've read part 1. New chapter every Friday :)

entry.title: Running Back Home
entry.summary:
Author: Not_Ren_42

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 22,286Chapters: 5/12Kudos: 428

Summary: Buck is no stranger to being alone. He spent years fending for himself after leaving the house he grew up in, and even the years before that, he didn’t really have anyone.He thought he had found a family with the 118. He had a captain he came to see as a father, found a mother in Athena and a wider family from his coworkers and theirs. Buck even thought he might have a chance at something more with the man who was his best friend and his son. He should have known better. -+- A post-lawsuit fic (kind of) where Buck leaves and never really had any intention of coming back. The universe has different plans for him though. New chapter every Friday :)

entry.title: The End in the Beginning
entry.summary:
Author: Second_starr

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,422Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 27

Summary: "I need you to wake up." His throat burns. "Chris needs you." A pause, with a shaking inhale. "So do I." The words slip out before he can catch them. Buck closes his eyes, and squeezes Eddie's hand once. The nurse enters a moment later. His time was up. Buck steps back reluctantly. The medication begins dripping into Eddie's IV. Slow and steady. Buck watches the monitor before he turns his back to leave. He watches the numbers change, and watches Eddie sink further away. Everything feels distant, Buck looks down one last time while the nurse guides him toward the door. Buck turns back, just once as Eddie lies motionless beneath the hospital lights. As he walks away, his gut tightens, everything screaming at him to turn back, to stay with Eddie. And somewhere far away, beyond the machines and pain and fear. Eddie wakes up. OR Eddie is critically injured, goes into a coma and dreams that he and Buck are married

entry.title: It’s the Animal Instinct in Me
entry.summary:
Author: EideticMoose

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,987Chapters: 1/2Kudos: 20

Summary: “It was like something inside him popped. Then his pants were soaked. It was ridiculous the sheer amount of fluid. Forming a puddle under his feet where his socks became translucent. It was like his water had broke. He stared down at the mess. Sheer embarrassment overshadowed by the relief that no one was there to witness it. If he could steal a pair of dry clothes and mop up the evidence it would be as if it hadn’t happened. A fantastic plan. If not for the fact that every internal organ inside of him twisted so sharply and then decided to try and ram itself out of his body via the space in between his legs. “Fuck” it was the only thing he could think. The cramping no longer like an unstretched calf, painful but able to be supported and massaged through. It pulled him down. Knees buckling unable to support the force as tears sprung to his eyes. Then it kept going. Tearing its way through his body like something was kicking its way through his pelvis. Burrowing into his pelvic floor. He had to stay calm but even breathing was difficult. The cramping eased but the pressure didn’t. This was now solidly a top 5 worst day of his life.” Unbeknownst to Buck he goes into labour at work.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: You Said My Name
entry.summary:
Author: K0maeda_88

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,505Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 48

Summary: Okay, this was a new step.He wasn’t a stranger to masturbating in this bathroom. But usually he saves himself for the shower, refusing to do it anywhere else where he could risk Eddie seeing.But this is a different tone. It has a dangerous tilt to it. Eddie is in his bedroom, wide awake, getting ready, and here Buck stands, only in his boxers, slowly losing subtlety as he grinds further into the counter until he’s at full mast.It’s wrong. He knows this.***TLDR: Eddie walks in on Buck fingering himself after he accidentally moans his name.

entry.summary:

entry.title: I love you, baby, I promise
entry.summary:
Author: paleredheadinascifi

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,261Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 810

Summary: “I can’t sleep,” Spooky Doorway Eddie says. “Can we just keep fighting tomorrow?”The annoyance drops from a boil to a simmer. He reaches for the covers, holding up a corner in an invitation for a temporary truce. “I’m still mad at you.”“I know,” Eddie offers, crossing the room and slipping beneath the sheets. “I’m mad at you, too.” Or, a first fight and a truce.

entry.title: turgor
entry.summary:
Author: writedontfight

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 661Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 19

Summary: There's a few things Buck does when he's nervous. Or, not even nervous necessarily, just crawling with excess energy. Those times when his blood feels like it's being pressurized. Like he's a plant in a lab being tested for its turgor. At least they cut a plant's stem before it goes in the chamber, though. The sap has somewhere to go.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV)
  • Evan "Buck" Buckley
  • Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV)

  • Mild Hurt/Comfort

entry.title: I'll bring you home
entry.summary:
Author: CarpeDiem911

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,492Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 172

Summary: After a tragic accident leaves Connor and Kameron’s son orphaned, Buck struggles with what role he’s supposed to play in Theo’s life — and whether someone like him could ever be enough for a child. Before he and Eddie can figure any of that out, the 118 is called to an active hostage situation at a Los Angeles junior high school. What starts as another terrifying call quickly turns into every firefighter’s nightmare.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: Somebody, Get Me Through This Nightmare
entry.summary:
Author: MaskedmenMaruaders

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,089Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 47

Summary: How long had it been again? Four months? Five? Maybe even longer, since he dropped the lawsuit. Still, he wasn't welcome. He wasn't back at the 118, he wasn't even a firefighter anymore, because it just reminded him of his family. Buck wanted them back, but he couldn't have that. OR Eddie isn't the only one who fights.
